programmes.show_description: Thriller with Dougray Scott. It's a race against time when a man travelling on the train with his son realises the brakes have been sabotaged and they are speeding toward a fatal collision.
Blood-drenched Hammer horror. When a seductive vampiress returns from the grave, she casts her alluring spell over all who encounter her, including the young women at a finishing school.

A landlord signals that money is owed by turning his tenant's power on and off; he claims his efforts resulted in $50 placed on his car under a rock.
The sale of alcohol, a pay to-play talent show and alleged Facebook slander come into play when a dance studio owner is sued.
When pet owners neglect to neuter their dogs, they end up with a litter of Husky/Pit Bull puppies and a fight over who gets to keep them.
When a woman asks her roommate the whereabouts of an LP and he says he sold it at a garage sale, all hell breaks loose.
A woman sues her former friends for slander after they allegedly refuse to return an $800 iPhone.
A construction worker allegedly takes the law into his own hands by stealing property from his boss after claiming he was not paid.
A Pit Bull interrupts a woman's evening stroll by scaling a six-foot privacy fence and attacking her; she fights back with mace, until it runs out.
A limo company owner accuses his ex-driver of being negligent after his $200,000 vehicle is damaged; the ex-employee says his driving record is impeccable.
A woman cries as she dramatically recounts the terror of seeing her Terrier 'Dolly' being viciously attacked by her neighbour's Spanish Bulldog.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
An audacious scam cons a group of NHS hospitals out of over twelve and a half million pounds.
A locksmith scams a London hospital out of nearly half a million pounds.
Abraham Shakespeare won the lottery in 2006. Dee Dee Moore befriended him, gained control of his assets, and murdered him in 2009.
The Reclusive Millionaire: In this programme, each episode reveals a new murder in which the killer or victim lived a life of luxury and wealth as experts unpack how and why the murder happened.

An elderly, wheelchair-bound spinster begins receiving strange anonymous phone calls in the middle of the night. Gladys Cooper guest stars.
A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a very advanced computer named Agnes, who wreaks havoc on his love life.
Thriller with Denzel Washington. While a police hostage negotiator deals with a bank robbery-turned-siege, a political fixer is sent to make sure secrets in the vault stay hidden.
Thriller with Noomi Rapace. After failing to apprehend the terrorist behind a Paris attack that claimed many lives, a CIA agent is determined to prevent a lethal biological attack on London.
Action thriller with J. K. Simmons. When a team of Navy SEALS in war-torn Europe discover gold at the bottom of a lake, they try to retrieve it for the locals - but are detected by the enemy.
High-octane crime thriller with Nicolas Cage. A crew of former prisoners are hired by the eccentric head of a crime syndicate to kidnap the baby of a rival mobster.

A woman sues a man for vet bills after his larger dog allegedly attacked her Yorkie; he claims she is lying about witnessing the attack.
A young man claims his ex-girlfriend was cheating on him; she says he threatened to post photos of her online.
A woman claims she paid thousands for sneakers but demands a refund when the shoebox that arrives is allegedly empty.
A young man's defence for allegedly damaging a teenager's phone with a laser beam is that he's a redneck and that's what he does for fun.
After drinking half a bottle of vodka, a man is accused of slapping his girlfriend and destroying her belongings; he claims she attacked him.
A man sues his ex-boyfriend's sister-in-law for falsely accusing him of burglarizing her home.
A woman accused of being a retaliatory nuisance is arrested by cops despite her confinement to a wheelchair; she denies all charges.
A convenience store owner is accused of attacking a man with a baseball bat; the man is accused of being a panhandler and a thief.
A homeless woman gets a master's degree and buys her own home; her mistake is renting to a mother of three who was living in her car.

In the UK, a woman is found murdered after a date. Footage of her abandoned car leads the police to her killer. In the US, a woman's remains are found.
In the US, a dying man calls for help. Police work to crack the case through footage and data. In the UK, a neighbour's security camera holds the key to solving a murder.
Investigating the disappearance of 6-year-old Etan Patz and the case that haunts the detectives who spent more than three decades trying to find him.
When an American tourist is killed in a Mexican resort, police on both sides of the border use forensic evidence to uncover a sinister truth.
The Stake-Out: Analysing the evidence, the medical detectives solve real crimes using forensic techniques, alongside reconstructions (which may be unsuitable for younger viewers).

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. Trivette's girlfriend disappears and pictures of her surface on an internet site...
Nautical horror with Treat Williams. Modern-day pirates overrun an ocean liner, only to face a grotesque sea monster lurking in the bowels of the ship that has already killed the passengers.
Tense thriller with Rutger Hauer. A lone teenage motorist finds himself unwillingly implicated in the crimes of a psychopathic hitch-hiker engaged in a rampant killing spree across America.
